plugins.name: bns-dev
plugins.description: The brasas & nube development plugin. Ships the image-generator skill (Gemini Nano Banana Pro image generation) and the repo-modernization-auditor skill (audit and modernize aging repos to be clean, current, safe, and agent-friendly); home for dev tooling as it emerges.

plugins.name: writing
plugins.description: General-purpose, publication-agnostic writing & editing skills: fact-checker, humanizer, essay-pattern-language, content-refresh, and tunelito (human-in-the-loop review).
